project_id.description: Owning project id, or null for a no-project (global-partition) thread.

revision.description: Monotonic per-thread mutation counter; consumers drop stale/duplicate pings.

ThreadHeadPing.description: Payload of the `thread.head.updated` GLOBAL-partition journal event: a content-free sidebar invalidation ping emitted on every thread mutation (create / rename / archive / turn-add / run-terminal, from any surface). It carries identity only — consumers refetch the authoritative thread summary instead of trusting event content.
